rulings.Case Title: DANA LEE VS. CALIFORNIA STATE LOTTERY COMMISSION et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notic Of Motion To Vacate An Order (Judgment; Judicial Error) Pltf'S Request For Judicial Notice

rulings.Case Title: STEVE GIANANDREA VS. MARC A GIANANDREA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 15, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT MARC GIANANDREA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION; THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ONLY COVERS CLAIMS THAT EXISTED AT THE TIME. GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN IN TEN DAYS AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE THE TERMS OF THE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT AND FACTS ESTABLISHING A FIDUCIARY DUTY. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: TRANSPORT WORKERS'UNION,LOCAL 250A et al VS. MUNICIAPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint; Out Of State Aauthority
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 15, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT KGO TELEVISON, INC.'S Special Motion To Strike Complaint IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE STANDING TO BRING SUIT. THE RIGHT OF PRIVACY OF NUMEROUS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY DRIVERS IS SUBJECT TO PROTECTION. THE ACTION DOES NOT CHILL SPEECH. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award

rulings.Case Title: KGO TELEVISION INC VS. MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate Directed To Respondents Ordering Compliance With California Public Records Act And San Francisco'S Sunshine Ordinance; Notice Of Related Cases
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 15, 2007, LINE 11. PETITIONER KGO TELEVISION, INC.'S Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate Directed To Respondents Ordering Compliance With California Public Records Act And San Francisco'S Sunshine Ordinance: THE COURT RELIES ON ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE IN DENYING THE WRIT OF MANDATE. RELEASING P.S.R.'S IN UNREDACTED FORM WILL NOT GIVE THE PUBLIC A CLEARER UNDERSTANDING OF HOW THE M.T.A. CONDUCTS THE PUBLIC'S BUSINESS AND WOULD CONSTITUTE INVASION OF PRIVACY. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED RAISES MATERIAL QUESTIONS OF FACT AS TO THE RELIABILITY OF THE P.S.R.'S, ABSENT A FINDING OF AN ACTUAL VIOLATION. =(302/PJM/AP)
